ext.description: Shows Codex and Claude Code account usage, limit status (5-hour/weekly), and real-time token usage in the VS Code status bar and a dashboard.
config.title: AI Agent Usage Monitor
config.language: Display language. 'auto' follows the VS Code display language; otherwise force 'en' or 'ko'.
config.codexCommand: Command or absolute path to run the Codex CLI.
config.refreshIntervalSeconds: How often to refresh Codex account and rate-limit info (seconds).
config.extraUsageCommand: A community/user usage reporter command. Its stdout is shown in the dashboard.
config.showStatusBar: Show Codex usage in the VS Code status bar.
config.notifyOnStartup: Show a one-time notice on startup to open the dashboard.
config.showClaudeStatusBar: Show Claude Code usage (5-hour/weekly limits, tokens) in the VS Code status bar.
config.claudeConfigDir: Claude config folder path. If empty, uses CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR or ~/.claude.
config.claudeExtraProjectPaths: List of other environments' Claude projects folders to also include in token/cost/model aggregation. e.g. WSL: \\wsl$\Ubuntu\home\you\.claude\projects, another drive: D:\\you\.claude\projects. Must be reachable as files from this PC.
config.codexExtraSessionPaths: List of other environments' Codex sessions folders (or .codex homes) to also include in token/model aggregation. e.g. WSL: \\wsl$\Ubuntu\home\you\.codex\sessions, another drive: D:\\you\.codex\sessions. Must be reachable as files from this PC.
config.claudePlanRefreshSeconds: Base interval to refresh Claude plan limits (5-hour/weekly) via the OAuth usage endpoint. Default 120s. This is the floor; on HTTP 429 the interval adaptively increases (×2, up to 15 min) and converges back toward this base, never below it.
config.claudeTokenRefreshSeconds: How often to re-aggregate tokens/cost from Claude transcripts (JSONL). Works together with file-change watching.
config.claudeUsageAlertThresholds: Show a notification when Claude 5-hour/weekly usage crosses these values (%). Empty array disables alerts. (Re-alerts after the window resets.)
